buildCommand: pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server build && pnpm --filter @workspace/chez-florent build && if [ -f scripts/vercel-output.sh ]; then sh scripts/vercel-output.sh; elif [ -f ../scripts/vercel-output.sh ]; then sh ../scripts/vercel-output.sh; elif [ -f ../../scripts/vercel-output.sh ]; then sh ../../scripts/vercel-output.sh; else sh ../../../scripts/vercel-output.sh; fi
